requirement_topic.en: Mandatory SNI for in-scope electrical power tools
requirement_topic.zh: 适用范围内电动工具的SNI强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: 適用範圍內電動工具的 SNI 強制要求

summary.en: Indonesia uses mandatory SNI pathways for product categories placed in the national mandatory standard list, and power tools use SNI IEC 62841 adoption as the principal safety basis where applicable. BSN and Kemenperin-aligned evidence requires the model-level conformity package before market placement, with SPPT-SNI marking and LSPro-linked factory surveillance requirements applied where the scope indicates.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚对纳入国家强制目录的产品采用强制 SNI 路径，电动工具在适用时按 SNI IEC 62841 采用规则作为主要安全依据。BSN 与工业部的要求要求按型号提供合格性文件后方可投放，且在适用范围内需执行 SPPT-SNI 标识并通过 LSPro 等机构进行工厂监督。
summary.zht: 印尼對納入國家強制目錄的產品採用強制 SNI 路徑，電動工具在適用時按 SNI IEC 62841 採標規則作為主要安全依據。BSN 與工業部的要求要求按型號提供合格性文件後方可投放，且在適用範圍內需執行 SPPT-SNI 標識並透過 LSPro 等機構進行工廠監督。

standards_or_laws: BSN mandatory product framework for SNI scope
SNI IEC 62841 adoption and associated safety requirements for portable and cordless power tools
Kemenperin implementing routes for SPPT-SNI and SNI mark placement

summary.en: China typically relies on GB 3883 and related GB/T tool safety references for domestic placement, with CCC where the category is catalogued. These references can support technical mapping, but they are not the legal SNI mark pathway for Indonesia.
summary.zh: 中国通常以 GB 3883 及相关 GB/T 电动工具安全参考文件作为国内准入依据，目录内类别配合 CCC。该体系可用于技术映射，但并非印度尼西亚 SNI 标识和法定合规路径。
summary.zht: 中國通常以 GB 3883 及相關 GB/T 電動工具安全參考文件作為國內准入依據，目錄內類別搭配 CCC。該體系可用於技術映射，但並非印尼 SNI 標識和法定合規路徑。

standards_or_laws: CCC, where the Indonesian-targeted product category is also in domestic CCC scope

gap.en: The electrical gap is legal pathway substitution. A China file can prove electrical test performance but not Indonesian mandatory SNI scope closure, SPPT-SNI issuance, or mark compliance. The additional mapping required is 230 V, 50 Hz positioning against Indonesian placement assumptions, since many China documents assume a 220/380 V domestic configuration.
gap.zh: 电气差距在于法定路径替代。中国文件可证明电气测试表现，但不能替代印度尼西亚强制 SNI 范围闭环、SPPT-SNI 签发或标识合规。另一个补齐点是与印尼 230 V、50 Hz 使用场景对齐，因为中国文件常按 220/380 V 国内配置描述。
gap.zht: 電氣差距在於法定路徑替代。中國文件可證明電氣測試表現，但不能替代印尼強制 SNI 範圍閉環、SPPT-SNI 簽發或標識合規。另一個補齊點是與印尼 230 V、50 Hz 使用場景對齊，因中國文件常按 220/380 V 國內配置描述。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for power tools within the Indonesian mandatory SNI scope. SPPT-SNI and SNI mark readiness are part of market-entry conditions where the scope is mandatory.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/CCC evidence is mandatory domestically where applicable, but it is not a substitute for Indonesia SPPT-SNI and importer-facing mark readiness.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB 3883 evidence for engineering comparison, but treat it as non-binding for Indonesia unless the exact model is mapped to an active Indonesian mandatory SNI scope and SPPT-SNI evidence is issued.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国 GB 3883 可用于工程对照，但在未将具体型号映射到印尼有效强制 SNI 范围并取得 SPPT-SNI 证据前，不得视为对印尼合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國 GB 3883 可用於工程對照，但在未將具體型號映射到印尼有效強制 SNI 範圍並取得 SPPT-SNI 證據前，不得視為印尼合規。
